contents: Python NumPy Torch CPU and Torch CUDA RNG
checkpoint.metrics_jsonl_reconciliation: discard any epoch record not backed by last.pt

claim_boundary: Sequence approximation of independent dual-receptor computational Docking geometry; not binding probability, affinity, experimental competition, blocking, Docking Gold, or final submission evidence.

inner_protocol.final_epoch_count: rounded median of selected one-based epoch counts
inner_protocol.selection: train and validate independently for every observed inner fold

model.lora: supported with separate learning rate and gradient checkpointing
model.pooling: global plus two contact-weighted residue pools
model.scalar_prediction: explicit cross-fitted M2 base plus bounded residual
